content.en:
In a flash, three days passed.

At this time, the Spirit Clan informed Ye Tian and the others to go to the Spirit Cloud Heavenly Realm.

The Spirit Cloud Heavenly Realm is about to open!

Wow!!!

Ye Tian, along with the other five great gods of the human race, rushed to the Lingyun Heavenly Realm on the spaceship arranged by the Spirit Clan.

As for the Tianzun who accompanied the human race, he was secretly protecting.

Soon, Ye Tian rushed to the Lingyun Continent, where the Lingyun Heavenly Realm was located.

"What a god!"

Ye Tian swept around and found a large number of great gods, half of which were great gods of the spirit race, and the remaining half were great gods of various universe great races, with less than one for each race and more than a dozen.

And the human race has six great gods this time, and the number is relatively large!

Wow!

A woman dressed in white suddenly appeared high in the sky, overlooking the many great gods below.

If someone looks down on these gods like this in normal times, it will definitely cause them to be dissatisfied.

After all, the great gods who can come here are all great gods with very high status and background, and a few people dare to look down on them like this, even the cosmic gods will stand on the same level and talk to them.

But this time it was a master of the Spirit Clan, and when they came to the Spirit Clan, they naturally didn't dare to be too presumptuous.

"All the great gods have listened, I am the spirit master of the spirit race, and half of the people present are great gods from foreign races, but since you want to enter the spirit cloud heaven realm, you must abide by the rules of our spirit race. After entering the Lingyun Heavenly Realm, you must not fight, if you violate it, don't blame our Spirit Clan for sanctioning the violator. In addition, the opening time of the Lingyun Heavenly Realm is one year, and after one year, all of them must come out, and they are not allowed to continue to stay in the Lingyun Heavenly Realm. "

After the Spirit Lord finished speaking, he vanished.

Then, a huge portal appeared in the void, and this portal was the entrance to the Lingyun Heavenly Realm.

"Let's go inside!"

The voice of the ghost lord came.

Whew!!

One by one, the great gods flew into the portal.

The portal is so large that it doesn't look crowded.

In the blink of an eye, there were not many great gods left on the earth.

"Let's go in too!"

Ye Tian fought against the eagle and the others.

"Good!"

Eagle Zhan Daozi and the other five nodded.

Whew!!

Ye Tian and the others flew into the space portal and entered the Lingyun Heavenly Realm.

......

Lingyun Heavenly Realm.

A bunch of great gods entered the place and gathered together.

At the same time, many great gods also sensed the suppression in the underworld.

This suppression does not act on the body, but on the immortal or divine power.

"What a strong suppression!"

Ye Tian also felt it.

Under the inexplicable suppression of the Lingyun Heavenly Realm, it was more difficult for his immortal power to operate.

And this kind of suppression is squeezing the immortal power, making the immortal power more refined.

"Even if an ordinary great god stands here for a year, his immortal power will be compressed a lot, no wonder the Lingyun Heavenly Realm has attracted the attention of so many great gods of the universe. This is indeed a rare place of opportunity for the great gods!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, the pressure in this position now is not very strong for Ye Tian, because his immortal power is far stronger than that of others, and the total amount is also much more.

The pressure of this position alone didn't help Ye Tian much, and if he stayed here for a year, it would hardly help much.

Therefore, he needed to continue to go deep into the Lingyun Heavenly Realm.

That's when it happened.

His Royal Highness the Heavenly Monarch, who was not far away, looked at him and said, "His Highness Wanfa, let's compare, I'll set off first!"

After speaking, His Highness the Heavenly Monarch flew towards the depths of the Lingyun Heavenly Realm.

Ye Tian ignored His Royal Highness the Heavenly Monarch and flew slowly with the other five Terran gods.

Along the way, there are great gods of extreme speed.

But soon, some of the great gods were forced to stop and could not continue flying.

Because they have reached their limit and cannot continue to bear that inexplicable pressure.

If they continue to move forward, their divine power will not be able to withstand it, and when the time comes, the divine power will explode indiscriminately, and the physical body will also burst.

Gradually, the other five great gods of the human race could not continue to move forward, and could only choose a place to silently endure the suppression of the Lingyun Heavenly Realm in order to compress the immortal power in their bodies.

And Ye Tian continued to move forward, he was still far from reaching his limit!

Time passed little by little, and Ye Tian also went deeper and deeper into the Lingyun Heavenly Realm.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to see the back of His Royal Highness the Heavenly Monarch.

At this time, His Royal Highness the Heavenly Monarch was flying very slowly, and it was obvious that he was almost at the limit.

"His Highness Wanfa!"

His Royal Highness the Heavenly Monarch discovered Ye Tian's traces, and when he saw Ye Tian gradually approaching him, he immediately frowned.

"Impossible, his cultivation years are short, even if he has the talent of time, according to the information, he has not been at the god level for a long time, and the degree of immortal power compression is definitely not as good as mine, with his immortal power, it should be difficult to resist the deeper suppression, he is estimated to be almost to the limit, as long as I persist a little longer, I can definitely surpass him!"

His Royal Highness the Heavenly Monarch said secretly.

But soon, his face changed dramatically.

Because his speed is getting slower and slower, he almost doesn't dare to fly quickly, for fear that he won't be able to withstand the pressure all of a sudden, and the divine power in his body will explode.

However, His Highness Wanfa's speed still maintained a relatively fast level, but his face was indifferent, as if he was very relaxed.

At this pace......

"I'm going to lose!"

His Royal Highness the Heavenly Monarch thought.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian swooped and surpassed His Royal Highness the Heavenly Monarch.

"Your Royal Highness the Heavenly Monarch, it seems that you are not very good, remember to give me ten origin artifacts after you go out!"

As he spoke, Ye Tian quickly distanced His Highness the Heavenly Monarch, making His Royal Highness the Heavenly Monarch behind him look angry and desperate.

After a while, Ye Tian opened a long distance.

At this time, Ye Tian had already forgotten about His Royal Highness the Heavenly Monarch, and now he just wanted to try his limit.

In the blink of an eye, a few days passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's flying speed was also very slow, and the suppression of immortal power by the Lingyun Heavenly Realm was becoming stronger and stronger, and it was gradually reaching Ye Tian's limit.

this day.

Ye Tian stopped, he could actually continue to move forward for a distance, but it was not necessary.

"It's right here!"

Ye Tian was ready to silently endure the suppression of the Spirit Cloud Heavenly Realm here.

And in order to increase the time, Ye Tian turned on the time acceleration ability of the space-time talent, which instantly accelerated the time to 1000 times!

In this way, Ye Tian could stay in the Lingyun Heavenly Realm for at least 1,000 years.

With such a long period of time, he could naturally easily compress the immortal power to the limit.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to compress and compress the immortal power.

After only a few months of compression in the time acceleration environment, Ye Tian had compressed it to 11 times the immortal power, which could withstand stronger suppression.

"Keep going!"

Ye Tian advanced another distance and continued to compress the immortal power.

In this way, Ye Tian advanced a certain distance every few months, and the immortal power multiplier he compressed became higher and higher.

12 times!

13 times!

14 times!

15 times!

......

Ye Tian didn't know how many times his compression limit was, but to have such an opportunity, he naturally tried his best to compress his immortal power.

In the blink of an eye, a year is about to pass!
